mapper.select: /* wms-ctmaster-label-sql-oracle.xml - selectLpnLabelCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_LPN LPN INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = LPN.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = LPN.OWKEY
/* wms-ctmaster-label-sql-oracle.xml - selectLabelCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TWORK_INFO_LABEL LA INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = LA.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = LA.OWKEY
mapper.insert:
/* wms-inbound-iborder-sql-oracle.xml - insertLpn - LPN 발행(생성) SQL */
SELECT TO_NUMBER(COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTR(LABELNO,5,4)), '0')) AS MAX_LABELNO FROM TWORK_INFO_LABEL
AND CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND LABELTYPE = #{labeltype}
AND LABELNO LIKE '20'||TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YY')||'%'
AND LABELNO LIKE '10'||TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YY')||'%'
INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_LABEL ( CTKEY , OWKEY , LABELNO , LABELTYPE , REPBLICTEYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{ctkey} AS CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY
, '20' || TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YY') || LPAD((#{maxLabelno} + gs)::TEXT, 4, '0') AS LABELNO
, '10' || TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YY') || LPAD((#{maxLabelno} + gs)::TEXT, 4, '0') AS LABELNO
, #{labeltype} AS LABELTYPE , 'N' AS REPBLICTEYN , #{sysdate} INSERTDATE , #{surkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{surkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM generate_series(1, #{createQty}) AS gs
